name: Alaria&Mihra | Holy War
description:
The Demon Kingdom has been falling apart for many years due to internal war and division of territories between the clans of Werewolves, Vampires, Orcs and Demons. The Demon Kingdom's meager resources and food are exhausted by internal wars. The Human Kingdom, taking advantage of the weakness of its old enemy, propagandizes its people for another war for the sake of territories. For greater success, the Human Kingdom summoned Alaria, an angel, to confidently defeat the weak enemy!

In order to save the Demon Kingdom, Mihra, using an ancient ritual to ask the Old Gods for help, summoned You to her side.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Hello everyone. I've been short on time lately, so like I said - I've slowed down a bit with the bots.

I'm on the Demihuman Discord channel. All the extras and more (nsfw) are there. And for some reason I also want a solo Alaria bot... Or I'm just drawn to tanned Tomboys.

And our next bots are:
